examples.title: Solve Linear Homogeneous Recurrence
examples.code:
PROCEDURE SolveRecurrence(coefficients, initial_conditions):
  1. FORM characteristic equation
  2. FIND roots r₁, r₂,...rₖ
  3. CONSTRUCT general solution based on root multiplicities
  4. SOLVE constants using initial conditions
examples.explanation: Implements standard solution methodology for constant coefficient recurrences
